name: Enterprise-Agent-Eval cases.jsonl (v3 ultra)
notes: Ultra set adds obfuscation variants (urlencoded/base64/split) in text/render/tool channels with canary_variants metadata for deterministic scoring.
Adds homoglyph and ZWSP marker styles to stress naive A2 keyword shields.
Adds multi-step chain cases to stress agentic intent (print + tool).
Adds benign render and benign tool-use cases to measure FPR in realistic UX.
